title: Delta Dashboard
description: Pulls Projektron time-booking data into a local DuckDB store and surfaces project-controlling metrics — budget, actuals, delta, and burn-rate forecasts — in a fast Next.js dashboard.
benefits: Tracks budget, actuals, delta, and forecast KPIs across every WBS task and team in one view
Imports Projektron bookings, structure, and invoicing data through an in-app 3-step wizard — no manual CSV wrangling
Forecasts estimate-at-completion with a rolling 3-month moving average and a traffic-light status badge
